emails.subject: RE: NDA - Choice Energy Ltd.
emails.body: Can you look around for the fax of this NDA signed by the Counterparty. Mark Greenberg will need to initial it and then send it down to Daniel Diamond and he will get an EnronOnline and Enron Net Works officer to sign it. Once it is signed we will need to fax it to the counterparty. I will forward Dan's email with the fax and phone number of the counterparty to you. Thanks! Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 03/16/2001 02:42 PM EJL <ejl@choiceenergy.com> on 03/16/2001 02:11:05 PM
